title: Warhammer Quest - Take a Look - Part Four - The Lair of the Orc Lord
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Kn5RCzQ9ufc

Daniel (@dungeondive) moves past the base game into the first big box expansion: The Lair of the Orc Lord. New dungeon tiles, new enemies, new scenarios — this is where Warhammer Quest starts to expand beyond its already generous foundation.

The expansion gets the same thorough treatment as the base game: component quality, new mechanics, how it integrates with what you already have, and whether it's worth hunting down decades later. For collectors and players alike, the big box expansions are where things get serious.

----

Are big box expansions worth the hunt for out-of-print games, or is the base game enough?
